overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a hazy, dystopian urban outskirts environment. The player character walks a loop around a gas station called 'CHOOMZ' and surrounding industrial buildings, passing futuristic billboards, solar installations, and desert-edge terrain with sparse pedestrian and vehicle activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse district with parking lot

events.description: turns left from facing industrial warehouses to face the CHOOMZ gas station

agents.ego_description: standing near a concrete barrier observing graffiti-covered warehouses, then turning left to face the gas station intersection

entered.detail: low-rise concrete warehouse with green Asian character graffiti on the side
white concrete divider wall along the edge of the parking lot
tall illuminated sign with 'CHOOMZ' text on a metal pole
wooden utility pole with power lines

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a hazy industrial parking lot area with a concrete barrier on the right and warehouse buildings ahead displaying green graffiti. The camera turns left to reveal the CHOOMZ gas station sign in the distance, transitioning from an industrial view to a commercial street view.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with gas station and advertising billboards

events.description: blue sedan drives past on the left side of the street
passes directly under the large floating billboard structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the gas station and toward the large intersection with floating billboards

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving along the street in the same direction as the camera
person in purple pants walking on the sidewalk ahead

entered.detail: teal and white gas station canopy with fuel pumps underneath
massive three-sided digital billboard structure hovering above the street on an orange pillar
tall digital advertising column with multiple screens
modern street lamp with orange horizontal light fixture

segments.scene_description: Walking along a multi-lane commercial street, the camera passes the CHOOMZ gas station on the right while approaching a massive floating digital billboard. A blue sedan drives past on the left, and pedestrians walk along the sidewalk. The environment features futuristic advertising structures and orange street lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with solar panel installation

events.description: turns right at the intersection onto a side street with solar panels

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner and walking along a sidewalk bordered by a fence and solar panels

entered.detail: bank of blue solar panels installed on a concrete base behind a fence
chain-link fence with barbed wire topping running along the sidewalk
curved elevated roadway structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the intersection, transitioning from the main commercial street to a side street lined with solar panel installations behind barbed wire fencing. The elevated highway ramp becomes visible in the distance as the camera walks along the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved road with palm trees and industrial backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking along a curved road lined with palm trees and billboards, with industrial towers visible through the haze

entered.detail: row of palm trees lining the left side of the curved road
large electrical transmission towers with multiple power lines
tall industrial structures and smokestacks visible through the haze
patch of dry desert grass and scrub vegetation between the road and sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a gently curving road lined with palm trees on the left, the camera moves through a transitional zone between urban and desert environments. Multiple digital billboards line the right side while industrial towers and power lines are visible through the hazy sky in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert-edge commercial street returning to gas station

events.description: returns to the CHOOMZ gas station area, completing the loop

agents.ego_description: continuing along the road and looping back toward the CHOOMZ gas station, passing through more open desert-edge terrain

notable_agents.action: person standing near the gas station entrance

entered.detail: digital display showing fuel prices in red LED numbers
standard traffic signal on a pole at the intersection
dry bushes and desert vegetation along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its loop by returning to the CHOOMZ gas station area, approaching from the opposite direction. The environment features desert scrub vegetation on the left and the gas station's fuel price sign becomes prominent on the right. A pedestrian stands near the station entrance as the camera walks along the final stretch of road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a hazy industrial outskirts area that transitions from a commercial hub into a desert-edge landscape before looping back to its origin. It begins in a concrete parking lot beside graffiti-covered warehouses, turning left to shift from an industrial view toward the distant CHOOMZ gas station. As the camera moves along a multi-lane street, the scene opens up to reveal floating digital billboards and passing traffic before turning right at an intersection into a side street lined with barbed wire and solar installations. The environment then shifts toward a transitional zone where the urban concrete gives way to palm trees and desert scrub, with industrial towers looming through the haze. Finally, the camera completes the circuit by returning to the CHOOMZ gas station, approaching the fuel price sign and a waiting pedestrian from the opposite direction.
